title: Bluemap Viewer
description: View your servers Bluemap in the game without leaving it!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b97df63165420e5355d2be3a02a20c5da488f59.png)
# Features
- Open's Bluemap when pressing `m` _this can be reconfigured_
- Changeable URLs so if you enter the wrong one you can enter a new one
- Remebers each servers URL
- Can also access Dynmap, Squaremap, uNmINeD, Overviewer _and technically any website_
# Known Issues
- A little bit laggy inside map - This is due to MCEF capping the browsers framrate at 30fps, they are working on moving the framerate cap to 60fps!
- Free-Flight does not work as of right now - Less prioritzied but I will try to fix it
# My plans
- Keep going with the mod.
# Images
### In use on my private create server
![img](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/naz8Kcvp/images/4e3b0a7baa3364d4c21f21030245317f8eadcc27.jpeg)
